prestazioni: Engine swap to a **JLH-3G15TD** 1.5L turbocharged inline-3 (stock in Geely Binyue/Proton X50) with a **Garrett GT2256S** turbo upgrade, ported and polished cylinder head, and **Mahle forged pistons** (8.5:1 compression) for 280whp on E85 with a **Link G4+ Xtreme** standalone ECU

Full **3.5-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust** by **Milltek Sport** with a **400-cell catalytic converter** and **Tial 44mm wastegate** for precise boost control, paired with a **Vibrant 1799 resonator** to reduce drone

Custom **KW Suspension Clubsport coilovers** (adjustable damping, 30mm drop) with **polyurethane bushings** from **SuperPro** (part #SPF0115K) and **H&R 25mm front / 20mm rear sway bars** to eliminate body roll, paired with **Brembo GT 340mm front brake kit** (4-piston calipers, 30mm rotors) and **Ferodo DS2500 pads**
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (Atlas Sport-specific, 3-piece front bumper, overfenders, and duckbill spoiler) with **custom carbon fiber side skirts** (hand-laid by **Seibon**) and **Vortex Generators** on the roof for aerodynamic stability at high speeds

**OEM+ LED headlight retrofit** with **Morimoto XB LED projectors**, **Dapper Lighting HID bi-xenon lenses**, and **Lux H1 fog light delete** (replaced with **Osram Laserline 2** auxiliary lights in custom **Vland aluminum housings**)

**Rotiform LAS-R 19x9.5 ET35 wheels** (staggered setup, 19x10.5 ET40 rear) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** (245/35/19 front, 275/30/19 rear) with **Hankook Ventus R-S4** semi-slicks for track days, paired with **Project Kics R40 6-piston lug nuts**
